scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run vendor
scripts.vendor: mkdir -p static/js/vendor && cp node_modules/apexcharts/dist/apexcharts.min.js static/js/vendor/apexcharts.min.js && cp node_modules/htmx.org/dist/htmx.min.js static/js/vendor/htmx.min.js && cp node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js static/js/vendor/alpine.min.js
